title: Use permanent short random download tokens and disable legacy numeric download URLs

requirements.text: Update the backend to assign each uploaded file a permanent, short, random public download token (not derived from the numeric file ID), and use this token for all public downloads.

quotes: the url is still d/1 for the first file. it should be random name, so it cannot be guessed.

acceptanceCriteria: When a user uploads a new file, the stored FileMetadata.publicToken is a short random string (e.g., 8–12 URL-safe characters) and is not equal to the file ID rendered as text.
The token is generated once per file and does not change across subsequent downloads.
The backend ensures token uniqueness by checking the token->fileId index and regenerating on collision before finalizing storage.

requirements.text: Disable legacy predictable numeric download URLs so that old tokens like "1" no longer work for public downloads, even if they exist in state.
acceptanceCriteria: Calling downloadFile with a token that matches the legacy numeric pattern (e.g., "1", "2", etc.) fails with an error indicating the link is invalid/disabled.
A valid non-numeric token successfully downloads the file and continues to increment per-file and global download counters as it does today.
The tokens index used by downloadFile does not allow continued access via numeric tokens for newly uploaded files.

requirements.text: Ensure the frontend continues to generate and display public download links using the backend-provided token (no client-side token generation), and that copied links use the format /d/{token}.

quotes: the url is still d/1 for the first file. it should be random name

acceptanceCriteria: The "Copy Link" action continues to copy URLs in the format `${origin}/d/${file.publicToken}` (as built by frontend/src/utils/links.ts).
After uploading a new file, the token shown/used in the copied link is the new random token returned in the file list metadata (not a numeric string).
Visiting a copied link routes to the existing public download page and attempts download using the token from the URL.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo (no additional backend services).
Do not edit any frontend files under frontend/src/components/ui or other paths listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Adding new authentication methods beyond Internet Identity.
Adding a UI for rotating/regenerating tokens for already-uploaded files (not requested).
Implementing file deletion UI (explicitly deferred by the user earlier).
